title: ziziphus oxyphylla var. pedicellaris
intro: Ziziphus oxyphylla var. pedicellaris, also known as the Jujube shrub, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins. The Jujube shrub offers various health benefits, such as antioxidant and anti-aging effects, cardiovascular protection, and improved immune function. In traditional Chinese medicine, Jujube is often prepared as a tea, dried fruit, or powder, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues.
